title: Avoid 'No procedures found' while procedures are still loading

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusted procedures dashboard empty-state gating so 'No procedures found' is not shown during active procedures fetch/hydration. Added test assertion to verify no empty-state text during initial loading.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Added account-loading guard for procedures empty-state: suppress 'No procedures found' while AccountContext is loading and while no selected account is ready. Added test coverage for account-loading path. Verified with local Playwright smoke after dev-server restart (no empty-state text during loading window).
